user_text:
You are composing the visual narrative arc for a 140.1s
solo Bayati performance, divided into 27 5-second
cycles. You see the full track in advance: a mel-spectrogram, a
five-panel DSP timeline (RMS / centroid / onset / Hijaz events /
silence), the per-cycle deterministic prose, and the Bayati
visual register reference photos.

### TRACK CORPUS PROSE

[cycle 0 · t=5s] Moderate intensity, falling. Dark timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Early in the performance, opening territory.
[cycle 1 · t=10s] Quiet, easing. Warm timbre. Very sparse articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Early in the performance, opening territory.
[cycle 2 · t=15s] Quiet, rising sharply. Warm timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on C#. Early in the performance, opening territory.
[cycle 3 · t=20s] Moderate intensity, falling. Balanced timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on A. Developing.
[cycle 4 · t=25s] Intense, falling. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on A. Developing.
[cycle 5 · t=30s] Peak intensity, rising sharply. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on B. Developing.
[cycle 6 · t=35s] Intense, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G# with secondary emphasis on A. Developing.
[cycle 7 · t=40s] Intense, falling. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G# with secondary emphasis on C#. Developing.
[cycle 8 · t=45s] Intense, falling. Very bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center D with secondary emphasis on C#. Developing.
[cycle 9 · t=50s] Moderate intensity, building. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on C#. Developing.
[cycle 10 · t=55s] Moderate intensity, building. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on G#. Developing.
[cycle 11 · t=60s] Intense, falling. Balanced timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center F# with secondary emphasis on B. Mid-performance.
[cycle 12 · t=65s] Intense, falling. Balanced timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center G# with secondary emphasis on B. Mid-performance.
[cycle 13 · t=70s] Moderate intensity, rising sharply. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
[cycle 14 · t=75s] Intense, falling. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center B with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
[cycle 15 · t=80s] Moderate intensity, building. Balanced timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center C#. Mid-performance.
[cycle 16 · t=85s] Moderate intensity, falling. Dark timbre. Very sparse articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Mid-performance.
[cycle 17 · t=90s] Moderate intensity, falling. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G# with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
[cycle 18 · t=95s] Moderate intensity, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Very sparse articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
[cycle 19 · t=100s] Quiet, falling. Warm timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Mid-performance.
[cycle 20 · t=105s] Quiet, falling. Warm timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Mid-performance.
[cycle 21 · t=110s] Moderate intensity, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on G#. Mid-performance.
[cycle 22 · t=115s] Moderate intensity, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center C#. Mid-performance.
[cycle 23 · t=120s] Quiet, easing. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on A. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 24 · t=125s] Quiet, falling. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on A. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 25 · t=130s] Quiet, sustained. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center G# with secondary emphasis on A. Deep into the performance.
[cycle 26 · t=135s] Moderate intensity, rising sharply. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on C#. Deep into the performance.

### EVENT TIMELINE

- (no Hijaz/Bayati events fired in this track)

### TASK

Compose the arc. Output **only** a single JSON object matching this
schema, no preface, no commentary, no markdown fences:

{
  "track_id": "<string>",
  "duration_s": <number>,
  "cycle_count": <number>,
  "overall_arc": [{ "act_index": <int>, "name": "<string>", "cycle_range": [<int>,<int>], "intent": "<string>" }, ...],
  "per_cycle_intent": [{ "cycle": <int>, "active_act": <int>, "intent": "<string>", "energy_hint": "low|rising|high|falling" }, ...],
  "element_vocabulary": {
    "anchors": ["<string>", ...],
    "palette_progression": [{ "cycle_range": [<int>,<int>], "palette": "<string>" }, ...],
    "introduce_at": { "<motif>": <int>, ... },
    "retire_at": { "<motif>": <int>, ... }
  },
  "foreshadow_pairs": [{ "plant_at": <int>, "pay_off_at": <int>, "note": "<string>" }, ...],
  "anticipation_offsets_ms": { "<cycle_idx>": <int in [-500,0]>, ... },
  "model": "claude-opus-4-7",
  "thinking_budget": <int>,
  "baked_at": "<ISO-8601>"
}

Constraints:
- `per_cycle_intent` MUST contain exactly 27 entries,
  indexed 0..26 in order. Missing or extra
  entries are validation failures and your response will be rejected.
- `anticipation_offsets_ms` keys are stringified cycle indices;
  values are integers in [-500, 0].
- `overall_arc[*].cycle_range` covers [0, 26]
  contiguously without gaps or overlaps.
- All fields in the schema are required; do not invent extra keys.
- Keep `intent` strings concrete and in the Bayati visual register
  (moonlight on water, open palm in low candlelight, solitary figure,
  loose linen, breath on glass, single feather, head bowed in shadow,
  back at a window at night). Do not propose Hijaz architectural imagery.
